word: H503 - אָלַף - ʼâlaph - aw-laf' - Bring forth thousands

sections.paragraph:
Original: אלף

Transliteration: 'âlaph

Phonetic: aw-laf'

BDB Definition:

  1. (CLBL) to make thousand-fold, bring forth thousands (verb)
  2. (TWOT) (Hiphil) producing thousands (verb)
  3. (BDB) chief, chiliarch (noun masculine)

Origin: denominative from H505

TWOT entry: 109

Part(s) of speech:
